name: Snowpeas with Red Bell Pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Stir in the minced garlic and seeded, sliced red bell pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
3. Add the trimmed, washed snow peas to the skillet and toss to mix with the vegetables.
4. Add water and cover the skillet.
5. Cook for 3 minutes or until the snow peas are just tender.
